economic_mechanism: Persistent index-option insurance demand can make observed VIX exceed subsequent SPY realized volatility; a high same-close VIX-to-fully-warmed-RV20 ratio during a positive SPY trend was tested as a selector for bounded bullish carry.
candidate_or_family_scope: Candidate SPY_VRP_PCS_VIX_RV_21D_V1 within canonical family SPY_VRP_VIX_RV_21D: SPY same-close VIX/RV20 at least 1.25, close above fully warmed SMA200, non-overlapping 21-session outcomes, and only conditionally a one-lot 21-DTE approximately 0.20-delta $1-wide put credit spread; no threshold, timing, DTE, width, symbol, or management mutation in-wake.
falsifier: Close the family if any of three frozen assessment windows has fewer than 10 non-overlapping treated episodes, treated mean below 1 vol point, treated positive frequency below 60%, fewer than 8 outcome-independent matched controls, or matched treated-minus-control mean at or below zero; also close if pooled density or integrity fails or the one-sided 95% circular-block-bootstrap lower bound for matched differences is at or below zero. Option pricing must remain uncalled after a mechanism failure.

strategy_advancement.summary: No candidate advanced beyond F0. The raw treated premium was positive, but the canonical SPY_VRP_VIX_RV_21D selector failed stable incremental edge against matched controls in 2020-2021 and on the pooled matched bootstrap; pricing_calls remained zero.

search_information.summary: Built and exercised a reusable strict-JSON mechanism-first VRP study with fully warmed features, non-overlapping episodes, outcome-independent no-replacement controls, assessment and pooled block-bootstrap gates, and a fail-closed conditional option boundary. The finalizer repaired the challenger-discovered positive fixture so it proves production matched-control density without weakening gates. Incidental repairs preserve None-versus-zero PMCC quote semantics and derive option-archive coverage labels from current data. Burst-stop posture now requires search-design reassessment rather than a third similar pre-screen.

useful_deltas.summary: A reusable SPY VRP mechanism-first runner computes fully warmed same-close VIX/RV/trend features, strictly forward realized-volatility outcomes, non-overlapping treated episodes, outcome-independent matched controls, deterministic circular-block bootstrap bounds, strict JSON labels, and a conditional fail-closed option branch.

The canonical SPY_VRP_VIX_RV_21D family closed at F0: 53 treated episodes and 35 matched controls; 2020-2021 matched mean -1.6221 vol points and pooled matched LB95 -2.5507 failed despite raw treated mean +3.9484 and treated LB95 +1.1085; pricing_calls=0 and registration_eligible=false.

The positive mechanism fixture now allocates enough non-overlapping calendar space for 19 treated and 19 matched-control windows per assessment, proving the unchanged production thresholds of at least 8 pairs per assessment and 24 pooled while retaining the matched-negative-control failure half.

After 17 prior no-advance wakes and consecutive TOM/VRP mechanism closes, the next wake is a search-design reassessment. It may authorize at most one later candidate only with a materially distinct mechanism, stronger outcome-independent controls, chronology, and frozen pre-option falsifier; otherwise it emits DIMINISHING_RETURNS.

critic_findings.finding: N1: create a second closed-family identity because prose, candidate, and family labels might differ.
critic_findings.rationale: The canonical JSON, closeout, candidate key, and inventory already agree on candidate SPY_VRP_PCS_VIX_RV_21D_V1 within the sole closed family SPY_VRP_VIX_RV_21D; no forked identity is warranted.

critic_findings.finding: N2: use coarse residual matching as permission to rescue the inspected family by retuning tolerances or thresholds.
critic_findings.rationale: Max absolute VIX difference 4.210001, max/median session distance 427/102, and two absolute paired differences above 50 widen uncertainty and reinforce FAMILY_CLOSED. Reopening requires a materially stronger control design, not in-sample retuning.

critic_findings.finding: N3: change the current dominant-failure wording as though the broad raw volatility premium itself failed.
critic_findings.rationale: The canonical wording already distinguishes positive raw treated VRP from failed incremental high-ratio/trend selector value and names both the 2020-2021 assessment and pooled paired-bootstrap failures.

critic_findings.finding: N4: authorize a third similar calendar-flow or VRP pre-screen despite strategy_burst_stop_required.
critic_findings.rationale: The sole NEXT is POST_VRP_SEARCH_DESIGN_REASSESSMENT. It blocks another similar pre-screen and familiar PCS volume by default; only a written material-novelty review may authorize at most one later candidate, otherwise DIMINISHING_RETURNS.

critic_findings.finding: N5: the focused VRP suite was red because the synthetic positive fixture produced only 3 matched pairs total while unchanged production gates require at least 8 per assessment and 24 pooled.
critic_findings.rationale: The fixture now provides 1,000 sessions per fold with 19 treated signals on a 45-session cadence, leaving disjoint 21-session control windows. The positive mechanism passes with 57 treated and 57 matched pairs; the outcome-perturbed matched negative control still fails. Production gates and the real SPY study were not changed or rerun to rescue the family.

critic_findings.finding: N6: readiness requires a strategy-NEXT change beyond POST_VRP_SEARCH_DESIGN_REASSESSMENT.
critic_findings.rationale: The readiness strategy NEXT was already correct. Finalization changes only stale verification wording and preserves the one post-VRP reassessment seed.

next: POST_VRP_SEARCH_DESIGN_REASSESSMENT: stop the no-advance burst and inventory remaining reset routes for a materially distinct economic mechanism, stronger outcome-independent control or placebo design with explicit residual-match limits, chronology capable of train and untouched holdout before option marks, and a frozen pre-option falsifier; authorize at most one later candidate only if all four are written, otherwise emit DIMINISHING_RETURNS rather than run familiar PCS volume.
